business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 6:00 AM - 4:30 PM. Primary commodities hauled: dry van general freight and packaged goods; flatbed steel, lumber, and machinery.

CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire: Yes.
